← Back to MIRAC Technologies

Fintech & Finance Management Software Singapore — MAS Compliant | MIRAC Technologies

Secure, MAS-compliant fintech software tailored for Singapore's dynamic financial sector.

Singapore is a global financial powerhouse and a leading hub for fintech innovation. Financial institutions, wealth management firms, and innovative startups operating in this region require highly secure, scalable, and compliant software solutions. Developing financial technology in Singapore demands strict adherence to the regulatory frameworks established by the Monetary Authority of Singapore (MAS). MIRAC Technologies specializes in engineering bespoke Fintech and Finance Management Software that meets these rigorous standards. Our robust platforms provide comprehensive multi-currency dashboards, enabling firms to monitor global portfolios and execute cross-border transactions seamlessly. We automate complex transaction processing, reconciliation, and settlement workflows, significantly reducing operational risks and manual errors. Crucially, our software is built with compliance at its core. It includes automated reporting modules designed specifically to meet MAS regulatory requirements, ensuring that businesses remain compliant without the burden of extensive manual auditing. The platforms also incorporate advanced security protocols, including biometric authentication and end-to-end encryption,

to safeguard sensitive financial data. By partnering with MIRAC Technologies, Singapore-based finance companies can accelerate their digital transformation, offer superior digital experiences to their clients, and confidently navigate the intricate regulatory landscape, all within a fixed-price engagement model.
